briefs.title: BC Business Corporations Regulation updated to recognize Indigenous nation ownership structures
briefs.summary: BC amended its Business Corporations Regulation to formally recognize Indigenous nations as a type of owner in corporate structures, and added a clear definition for professional limited liability partnerships (law or accounting firms with capped personal liability).
briefs.action_required: If your corporation is owned by or partners with an Indigenous nation, review your ownership records to confirm they reflect the new definitions.
